title: Baby Model Rewind
description: Return to the pre 26.1 baby entity models
body:
## Baby Model Rewind
Bring back Minecraft's old baby entity models!
|Without the pack|With the pack|
|--|--|
|![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZdXuNwUT/images/d446db9668691ddc81bf2272eda05f9e23bb7df0.png)|![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZdXuNwUT/images/693934bce96d410263366806c8f97c174999a1ee.png)|

### Note:
* This pack requires OptiFine or Entity Model Features to function
* The goal of this pack is to be as compatible as possible with other resource packs
  * Please contact me if you find a compatibility issue
* This is a work in progress pack, I hope to have all of the models completed soon
* Currently supports all humanoid baby entities, wolves, cats, and farm animals
